root.name: Slide 10: Add bullet point explaining 'Objects include CSS files, JavaScript files, images, videos'
root.description: Evaluate whether Slide 10 has a new bullet point added at an appropriate location with the required explanation, and that no extraneous changes were made.

children.name: Bullet point with correct content is added on Slide 10
children.description: Verify that a bullet point explaining 'Objects include CSS files, JavaScript files, images, videos' was added to Slide 10, with sufficiently correct content.

children.name: Bullet point is at an appropriate place
children.description: Verify that the new bullet point was added in a location that is semantically and visually appropriate (i.e., within the main content, not in an unrelated area or outside a bullet list).

children.name: No extraneous changes on Slide 10
children.description: Check that no unrelated or extraneous changes (text, layout, images, animations, transitions) were made to Slide 10, except for the bullet point addition.

children.name: No extraneous text or element changes on Slide 10
children.description: Ensure that only the bullet point was added and no unrelated text or element changes were made on Slide 10.

children.name: No extraneous animations/transitions on Slide 10
children.description: Ensure that no new or removed animations or transitions were introduced to Slide 10.

children.name: No extraneous changes to other slides
children.description: Verify that no changes (text, layout, slides, images, animations, transitions) were made to slides other than Slide 10.

metadata.task: Slide 10: Add a bullet point explaining 'Objects include CSS files, JavaScript files, images, videos' at an appropriate place
